title: Install SQL Server and SSMS
description: Installs SQL Server silently using a configuration file and installs SSMS silently. Idempotent and logs to C:\Windows\Temp\dtl-artifact-logs.

runCommand.commandToExecute: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -File install-sqlserver.ps1 -SqlInstallerUrl "{{sqlInstallerUrl}}" -SqlConfigUrl "{{sqlConfigUrl}}" -SqlEdition "{{sqlEdition}}" -RebootIfRequired "{{rebootIfRequired}}"; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -File install-ssms.ps1 -SsmsInstallerUrl "{{ssmsInstallerUrl}}"
